name: PowerShell Remoting via WinRM
description: Detects PowerShell remoting sessions used for lateral movement
query:
// Detect PowerShell remoting
// Trigger on Enter-PSSession, Invoke-Command with -ComputerName
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(Enter-PSSession|Invoke-Command.*-ComputerName|New-PSSession|Enable-PSRemoting)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 300 seconds
